---
title: "Green Roofs and Environmental Performance"
description: "Poster project using regression models to quantify the cooling effects of green roofs and inform urban sustainability planning."
categories: [Research, Environmental Statistics, Regression Modeling]
date: "2025"
---

::: {.project-hero}
## Green Roofs and Environmental Performance

Poster project using regression models to quantify the cooling effects of green roofs and inform urban sustainability planning.

::: {.project-links}
[View Poster](green-roofs-poster.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

## Executive Summary

This project investigated whether green roofs can reduce building-level heat exposure and improve environmental performance in urban settings. Using temperature and building data, I modeled the relationship between roof type and thermal outcomes to evaluate whether green roof infrastructure was associated with measurable cooling benefits.

The project connects applied statistical modeling with a practical sustainability question: how cities can use design interventions to reduce heat, improve climate resilience, and support more evidence-based urban planning decisions.

## Project Highlights

- Used regression modeling to estimate the relationship between green roof infrastructure and building temperature outcomes.
- Translated an environmental performance question into a statistical analysis suitable for a research poster format.
- Communicated technical results visually for an audience interested in sustainability, climate adaptation, and applied data analysis.

## Methods & Approach

The analysis focused on comparing temperature outcomes across buildings with different roofing characteristics. I used regression-based methods to evaluate whether green roofs were associated with lower temperatures while accounting for other relevant building or environmental factors.

The poster emphasized both statistical interpretation and applied relevance, presenting model results in a way that connected environmental data to broader questions about urban heat mitigation and sustainable infrastructure.

## Deliverables

::: {.deliverable-card}
**Research Poster**  
A poster presentation summarizing the research question, modeling approach, key findings, and sustainability implications of the green roofs analysis.

[View Poster](green-roofs-poster.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

## Skills

::: {.skill-tags}
`Regression` `Environmental Data Analysis` `Research Communication` `Data Visualization`
:::
